⚡
PS-Script-Hub
🚀 Self-Hosted PowerShell Management Platform

Manage, share & organise
PowerShell scripts at scale

PS-Script-Hub is a full-stack web application that gives your team a single, searchable, version-tracked home for every PowerShell script — with role-based access control, bulk imports, and a clean public portal.

Core Features
🌐
Public Script Portal
Read-only portal with live search, category & tag filtering, paginated grid, and syntax-highlighted script viewer. No login required.
🔐
Role-Based Access Control
Three-tier RBAC: Admin (full access), User (create & edit own), Viewer (read-only). JWT auth with httpOnly cookies.
⚡
Bulk Import Engine
Import scripts from GitHub repos, JSON manifests, ZIP archives, or legacy SQLite databases. Background job tracking with error logs.
📊
Admin Dashboard
Centralised dashboard with live stats, user management, bulk operations, DB backup/restore, and a built-in docs centre.
🏷️
Tags & Categories
Flexible taxonomy: user-defined categories and normalised lowercase tags. Multi-tag OR filtering. Bulk sanitiser for renaming & merging.
🐳
Docker-Ready Deployment
Single-container deployment with SQLite — no external database needed. Configurable via environment variables, auto-bootstraps admin account.
Permission Matrix
Capability Public (no login) Viewer User Admin

View script code✅✅✅✅

Bulk sanitiser (tags/categories)❌❌❌✅
Quick-Start Flow
Deploy container
Run docker run -p 5002:5002 ps-script-hub — SQLite DB auto-created on first boot.
Bootstrap admin
Admin credentials auto-generated and written to INITIAL_ADMIN_CREDENTIALS.txt. Override via env vars.
Import your scripts
Use the bulk import panel to pull from a GitHub repo, upload a ZIP, or paste a JSON manifest.
Share the public portal
Point your team to http://your-server:5002/ — no login needed to browse and copy scripts.
Create user accounts
Invite team members via Admin → Users. Assign user role for contributors or viewer for read-only access.

📡 API Reference

    
All endpoints are JSON-based. Protected routes require a JWT Bearer token (Authorization header) or an httpOnly session cookie set at login.


    

      

        Base URL: http://your-server:5002

        Auth header: Authorization: Bearer <token>
      

    


    

      
🌐 Public — No Authentication

      
GET/api/public/scriptsList scripts (paginated). Query: q, category, tags, status, sort, page, per_page

      
GET/api/public/scripts/:idGet single script details

      
GET/api/public/scripts/meta/categoriesList categories with script counts

      
GET/api/public/scripts/meta/tagsList tags with usage frequency

      
GET/api/healthHealth check — returns server uptime & DB status

    


    

      
🔐 Authentication

      
POST/api/auth/loginLogin with username/email + password → returns JWT + sets cookieRate: 15/min

      
POST/api/auth/registerSelf-register (disabled by default — ALLOW_SELF_REGISTER=1)Rate: 5/min

      
GET/api/auth/verifyVerify token validity, returns user infoJWT

      
POST/api/auth/logoutInvalidate session, clear cookieJWT

      
POST/api/auth/change-passwordChange own password (requires current_password)JWT

    


    

      
📜 Scripts — Authenticated

      
GET/api/scriptsList scripts accessible to current user (drafts per role)JWT

      
POST/api/scriptsCreate script. Body: title, description, category, code, status, tags, is_draftuser+

      
GET/api/scripts/:idGet script detail (owner or admin can see own drafts)JWT

      
PUT/api/scripts/:idUpdate script (owner or admin)user+

      
DEL/api/scripts/:idDelete script (owner or admin)user+

      
GET/api/scripts/export/jsonDownload all accessible scripts as JSONJWT

      
GET/api/scripts/export/manifestDownload portable import manifestJWT

      
POST/api/scripts/import/jsonImport scripts from JSON body/fileuser+

    


    

      
⚙️ Admin — Admin Role Only

      
GET/api/admin/statsDashboard statistics (users, scripts, jobs, status breakdown)admin

      
GET/api/admin/usersList all users with roles, status, last loginadmin

      
POST/api/admin/usersCreate user. Body: username, email, password, roleadmin

      
PUT/api/admin/users/:idUpdate user (role, is_active, email)admin

      
PUT/api/admin/users/:id/passwordReset any user's passwordadmin

      
DEL/api/admin/users/:idDelete user (cannot delete self)admin

      
GET/api/admin/db/backupDownload live SQLite database backupadmin

      
POST/api/admin/db/restoreRestore DB from uploaded file (auto-backup before overwrite)admin

    


    

      
⬇️ Bulk Import

      
POST/api/bulk/import/githubScan GitHub repo for PS1/PSM1 files. Body: repo_url, token (opt), max_depthuser+

      
POST/api/bulk/import/manifestImport from JSON manifest (upload or body). Supports duplicate handlinguser+

      
POST/api/bulk/import/zipUpload ZIP archive containing PS1 filesuser+

      
POST/api/bulk/import/dbImport from legacy SQLite database fileuser+

      
GET/api/bulk/jobsList all import jobs for current useruser+

      
GET/api/bulk/jobs/:idGet import job status, counts, error loguser+

    


    

      
🏷️ Sanitiser

      
POST/api/sanitizer/tags/renameRename or merge a tag across all scriptsadmin

      
POST/api/sanitizer/tags/deleteRemove a tag from all scriptsadmin

      
POST/api/sanitizer/categories/renameRename a category globallyadmin

      
POST/api/sanitizer/find-replaceFind & replace text in script descriptions or codeadmin

    


  







  

    
🏗️ Architecture & Data Model

    
PS-Script-Hub is a Flask monolith with SQLite, containerised for easy deployment. No external dependencies at runtime.


    

      

        
⚙️ Tech Stack

        
Backend frameworkPython 3 + Flask 2.3+

        
DatabaseSQLite (file-based)

        
AuthPyJWT + Werkzeug PBKDF2

        
FrontendVanilla JS (no framework)

        
Rate limitingFlask-Limiter

        
GitHub APIRequests library

        
ContainerDocker (single image)

        
Default port5002 (configurable)

      

      

        
🔒 Security Model

        
PasswordsPBKDF2-SHA256 (Werkzeug)

        
SessionsJWT HS256, 7-day expiry

        
Cookie flagshttpOnly, SameSite=Strict

        
RBACadmin / user / viewer

        
Rate limits15/min login, 5/min register

        
Self-registerDisabled by default

        
Unknown rolesDefault → viewer

        
DB restoreAuto-backup before overwrite

      

    


    
Database Schema

    


      

        

          
users

          
idINTEGERPK

          
usernameTEXTUNIQUE NOT NULL

          
emailTEXTUNIQUE NOT NULL

          
passwordTEXTPBKDF2 hash

          
roleTEXTadmin|user|viewer

          
is_activeINTEGER0|1 default 1

          
created_atDATETIME

          
last_loginDATETIMEnullable

        


        

          
script_tags

          
idINTEGERPK

          
script_idINTEGERFK → scripts.id

          
tagTEXTlowercase normalised

          
—UNIQUE(script_id, tag)

        

      


      

        

          
scripts

          
idINTEGERPK

          
user_idINTEGERFK → users.id

          
titleTEXTNOT NULL

          
descriptionTEXT

          
categoryTEXTindexed

          
statusTEXTtested|inprogress|faulty

          
is_draftINTEGER0|1 hides from public

          
codeTEXTfull PowerShell source

          
source_urlTEXTnullable

          
authorTEXTnullable

          
created_atDATETIME

          
updated_atDATETIME

        


        

          
bulk_import_jobs

          
idINTEGERPK

          
user_idINTEGERFK → users.id

          
job_typeTEXTgithub|manifest|zip|db

          
statusTEXTpending|processing|completed|failed

          
imported_scriptsINTEGER

          
failed_scriptsINTEGER

          
error_logTEXTJSON array

          
completed_atDATETIMEnullable

        

      

    


    
    
Project Structure

    

      PS-Script-Hub/

        ├─ app.py — entry point

        ├─ server/

          ├─ main.py — app factory, blueprint registration

          ├─ auth.py — JWT/RBAC decorators

          ├─ db.py — schema, migrations, seed, bootstrap

          ├─ config.py — secret key, paths

          ├─ routes/

            ├─ public.py — read-only public endpoints

            ├─ auth.py — login/register/verify/logout

            ├─ scripts.py — CRUD + export/import

            ├─ admin.py — user mgmt, backup/restore, bulk

            └─ sanitizer.py — bulk tag/category operations

          └─ services/

            ├─ importers.py — GitHub scanner, PS parser

            └─ file_importers.py — ZIP/SQLite extractors

        ├─ templates/

          ├─ public/ index.html — public SPA

          └─ admin/ index.html — admin SPA

        ├─ database/

          ├─ sample_scripts.json — seed data

          ├─ scripts.db — created at runtime

          └─ .secret_key — persisted JWT signing key

        ├─ docs/ — USER_GUIDE, ADMIN_GUIDE, VERSION_HISTORY…

        ├─ requirements.txt

        └─ README.md
